allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script type=\\"application\\/ld\\+json\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);try{const j=JSON.parse\(m[1]\);console.log\('✅ JSON-LD valide. Entités:',j['@graph'].map\(n=>n['@type']\).join\(', '\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('❌ JSON invalide:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script type=\\"application\\/ld\\+json\\">\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);try{const j=JSON.parse\(m[1]\);const org=j['@graph'].find\(n=>n['@type']==='Organization'\);console.log\('✅ JSON-LD valide'\);console.log\('menber présent ?', 'menber' in org\);console.log\('image:', org.image\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('❌ JSON invalide:',e.message\);}")
